violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Adjustments to door closing and/or weather stripping to be made. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The floor covering in the walk-in cooler was observed to be chipped/cracked exposing the wooden sub flooring. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The floors/walls/ceiling surfaces under and behind shelving in the walk-in cooler were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The floor covering in the walk-in cooler was observed to be chipped/cracked exposing the wooden sub flooring. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

The floors/walls/ceiling surfaces under and behind shelving in the walk-in cooler were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
